.file-embed.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 98%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 98%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 98%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 98%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 98%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 98%) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.067) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
